typography.guidelines: Do not use Inter, Roboto, or generic sans for headings. Use Outfit for clean, aesthetic presence and Manrope for legible data. Avoid defaulting to bold; use light or medium weights for premium feel.

colors.guidelines: Strictly avoid default SaaS blue, teal, or neon. Use the provided organic palette (sand, moss, terracotta) to build a calm, low-anxiety financial experience.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs (p-6, p-8, p-12 inside containers).
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Control Room grid for dashboard, using gap-6. Every pixel utilized, no jagged bottoms. Mobile-first grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4.

surface_styles.cards: Flat solid background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-[#E6E3D8]), subtle shadow (shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(44,40,37,0.04)]), rounded-2xl. Internal padding p-6 or p-8.
surface_styles.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (with background saturation if possible), 1px bottom border border-white/40.
surface_styles.ai_elements: Subtle background tint (bg-[#F0EEE7]) with an accent color (ai_magic or positive) left border or subtle badge style.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow increase, border color darken slightly.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for bento grid children using Framer Motion.

components.financial_health_score: Hero card component. Number in text-6xl+, tracking-tighter. Color: positive (Moss Green) if high. Includes subtext using label scale. Place 'Financial Behavior Profile' badge near this.
components.financial_behavior_profile: Pill tag (rounded-full) showing 'Smart Saver', 'Spender', 'Balanced' with dynamic AI suggestion text. Use subtle bg (bg-[#F0EEE7]) and text_primary.
components.expense_prediction: Area or Line chart using Recharts. Soft curves (monotone), no grid lines or very faint dashed lines. Tooltip should match card surface style.
components.anomaly_alerts: Floating or stacked insights list. Use Terracotta (#CC6C5B) accent for overspending. Include 'Tracing Beam' or subtle pulsing dot for unread alerts.
components.budget_auto_suggestion: List/table layout. Show current vs. suggested monthly budget. Use subtle progress bars.
components.affordability_calculator: Input/Calculator widget. User enters item + price. Instant visual feedback: ✅ (Affordable), ⚠️ (Risky), ❌ (Not Recommended) with supporting text.
components.goal_risk_predictor: Card with progress bar. Highlight 'trajectory' showing if user is on track or missing goal.
components.nlp_expense_entry: Prominent 'command-palette' style input field mimicking a search bar at the top or dedicated card. 'Spent 500 on food yesterday'. Pressing Enter parses it.
components.transaction_history: Clean table or list. Left-aligned data. Use Manrope for numbers. Use positive color for income, text_primary for expense.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5, standard size (w-5 h-5), matching text color.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast ratio meets APCA/WCAG standards.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='nlp-expense-input').

instructions_to_main_agent: Load fonts from Google Fonts: Outfit and Manrope.
Use Tailwind CSS for all layout and styling. Do not use plain CSS for component styles.
Implement Shadcn UI for standard interactives but STRIP the Vercel-look by applying the surface_styles defined here.
Use framer-motion for smooth UI transitions (staggered entries).
Build the dashboard using a bento-grid layout (Control Room mode) with gap-6.
Create realistic mock data for all AI features (Financial Health, AI Profile, Predictions).
Do not use generic SaaS blue colors. Strictly adhere to the warm sand/moss green/terracotta palette.
Follow 'Generous Spacing Philosophy' — do not cram content.
Never use placeholder URLs for images; use the provided media_urls.
